title: SIRV: Spatial inference of RNA velocity at the single-cell resolution
author: Tamim Abdelaal
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Spatial transcriptomics and scRNA-seq datasets used for integration and prediction of un/spliced expression for spatially measured genes using SIRV, used to infer the RNA velocity in the spatial context
steps_raw: Spatial transcriptomics and scRNA-seq datasets used for integration and prediction of un/spliced expression for spatially measured genes using SIRV, used to infer the RNA velocity in the spatial context
